name: Lamb Chops Korabiak
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half of the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add mushrooms and onions, and sauté until tender, about 5 to 10 minutes. Remove and keep warm.
3. Melt the remaining butter in the same skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Sprinkle the lamb chops with rosemary, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
5. Add the lamb chops to the skillet and sauté until browned on both sides about 5 minutes.
6. Reduce the heat to medium and continue cooking until the lamb is tender.
7. Transfer the lamb chops to a heated platter.
8. Pour wine into the skillet and cook over medium-high heat, scraping up any browned bits clinging to the bottom of the pan, until the liquid is reduced by about 1/3.
9. Spoon the vegetables over the lamb chops and top with sauce.
